=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Atlantic City
New Jersey
Hilton Hotel, Grand Theater
2003.05.09

Unknown rec. Great sound. 
The Waifs set included


CD1

1 intro 2 Maggie's Farm (Bob on piano), 3 Tell Me That It Isn't True (Bob on piano, Larry on pedal steel), 4 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 5 Lay, Lady, Lay (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel), 6 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano), 7 Watching The River Flow (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar), 8 Blind Willie McTell (Bob on piano, Larry on cittern), 9 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano), 10 Standing In The Doorway (Bob on piano), 11 Dignity (Bob on piano), 12 Just Like A Woman (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel),

CD2

1 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar), 2 Moonlight (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on standup bass), 3 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 4 (encore), Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano), 5 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano)

~~The Waifs~~, 

6. Wayfaring Stranger, 7. Lighthouse, 8. Fisherman's Daughter, 9. Bridal Train, 10. London Still, 11. Lies, 12. Crazy Train, 13. When I die 


Concert # 1517 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 16 of the 2003 US Spring Tour. 2003 concert # 27.
Concert # 16 with the 16th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & piano), Freddie Koella (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

2, 4, 11 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
4, 11, 13 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
6, 12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
7 Larry Campbell (cittern).
